macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: Meta has reportedly added four more OpenAI researchers to its ranks, underscoring the intensifying talent war among top AI labs. The hires are part of a broader push by major platforms to secure frontier-model expertise.

items.title: DoorDash launches AI chatbot for ordering and reservations
items.summary: DoorDash unveiled a new AI-powered chatbot that lets users order food, groceries, and restaurant reservations using text prompts and photos. The feature reflects a shift toward conversational commerce, where AI handles more of the task directly.

items.title: Google updates NotebookLM with Gemini 3.5 by default
items.summary: Google has updated NotebookLM to use Gemini 3.5 as the default model and added research features that can suggest sources. The change makes the product more autonomous by reducing the need for users to supply their own materials.

items.title: Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5
items.summary: Anthropic reportedly launched Claude Fable 5, a new top-tier model for enterprise customers and paid subscribers. The model includes stronger safeguards intended to block high-risk outputs in areas such as cybersecurity and biology.

items.title: Meta rolls out Business Agent across messaging apps
items.summary: Meta has globally deployed Business Agent on WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger, enabling AI agents to answer questions, qualify leads, recommend products, book appointments, and close sales. The rollout highlights rapid adoption of AI assistants in customer service and sales workflows.

items.title: ChatGPT reaches one billion monthly active app users
items.summary: ChatGPT reportedly crossed one billion global monthly active app users in May, making it the fastest app ever to hit that milestone. The figure underscores the scale of consumer adoption for generative AI tools.

items.title: OpenAI launches a new background memory feature called ‘dreaming’
items.summary: OpenAI has introduced a background memory feature that turns past chats into a running, category-sorted profile covering areas like travel, hobbies, and work. The feature is designed to make ChatGPT more personalized over time.

items.title: Alphabet raises $85 billion in a stock sale earmarked for AI
items.summary: Alphabet is raising $85 billion in a record-breaking stock sale aimed at funding AI-related investments, according to the report. The size of the raise suggests continued heavy capital spending across the AI infrastructure stack.

items.title: Google signs massive GPU access deal with SpaceX
items.summary: A Friday SEC filing reportedly shows Google will pay SpaceX $920 million per month starting in October 2026 for access to roughly 110,000 NVIDIA GPUs plus supporting hardware. The deal highlights the escalating demand for large-scale compute in AI.

items.title: AI-designed vaccine reaches first human trial
items.summary: University of Cambridge researchers have completed the first human trial of a vaccine whose active ingredient was designed entirely by AI. The result is a notable milestone for AI-assisted biomedical research.

items.title: Cloudflare says bots now generate more traffic than humans
items.summary: Cloudflare reports that bots accounted for roughly 57% of internet visits over the past week, surpassing human traffic for the first time. The trend points to a major shift in web traffic patterns and the growing footprint of automated systems.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
